title: tina one impossible house
prompt: Treat Image 1 as the edit target. Preserve Tina, her face, hair, clothing, seated position, package, candy, car interior, and camera. Image 2 is a support reference for her identity and the translucent pink candy only. Outside the window every house remains ordinary except one. Its open front door reveals a dense glowing mango forest vastly larger inside than the house, extending for miles with mist, jewel-like fruit, and tiny distant figures. Warm tropical light spills from the impossible doorway onto the sidewalk while the building exterior stays normal. Tina has just begun to notice. Quiet cinematic surrealism, one impossible place, realistic Los Angeles neighborhood, no portal ring, no generic magic particles, no text.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Generate exploratory cinematic candy-commercial styleframes. Follow the stated role of each reference image. When Image 1 is named as the edit target, preserve its subject, face, wardrobe, car interior, camera position, and photographic realism unless the prompt explicitly changes them. Avoid captions, panel borders, watermarks, generic candyland, and random rainbow effects.
